zh.Winterbourne, Dorset, England: 英國英格蘭多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同
zh.lifeSummary: Sir John De Winterbourne是Roger ll de Winterbourne的兒子，於大約1304年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同。他於大約1320年與Lady. John de Winterbourne在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Winterbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Winterburn
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English winter-burna ‘winter stream’, for a stream which only flows, or flows at a faster rate, during the winter and more or less dries up in summer, such as Winterburn in Gargrave (Yorkshire), Winterbourne (Berkshire, Gloucestershire), Winterbourne Bassett (Wiltshire), or one of thirteen parishes named Winterborne in Dorset, including Winterborne Abbas, Winterborne Monkton, and Winterborne Zelstone. In most cases, the form Winterburn can be associated with Winterburn in Gargrave (Yorkshire), though no such association can be made between other surname forms and corresponding placenames.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John De Winterbourne was born about 1304, in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England, United Kingdom as the son of Roger ll de Winterbourne. He married Lady. John de Winterbourne about 1320, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

ja.Winterbourne, Dorset, England: イギリスイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン ハーリングストーン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John De Winterbourneは約1304年にイギリスイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン ハーリングストーンでRoger ll de Winterbourneの息子として生まれた。約1320年にイギリスイギリスでLady. John de Winterbourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John De Winterbourne(은)는 대략 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 윈터보우른 허링스톤에서 Roger ll de Winterbourne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1320년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady. John de Winterbourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John De Winterbourne родился около 1304 г. в местности винтирбурн хиррингстоун, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Roger ll de Winterbourne. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady. John de Winterbourne около 1320 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.
